hero.headline:
Glow All Flight Long
with Airhydra
hero.subheadline: Elevate your journey with our premium in-flight hydrating gel. Dermatologist-crafted to combat altitude stress, ensuring you arrive as radiant as you depart.
hero.primaryCtaPrefill: Hi AirHydra, I'd like to order the premium In-Flight Hydrating Gel

productGallery.headline: Luxury In-Flight Hydration
productGallery.subheadline: Crafted for the discerning traveler who demands excellence at 30,000 feet.

images.alt: AirHydra In-Flight Hydrating Gel — Front View
AirHydra In-Flight Hydrating Gel — Side View

beforeAfter.headline: See the Transformation
beforeAfter.subheadline: Real results from real flights. Experience the difference AirHydra makes.
beforeAfter.description: Our altitude-adaptive formula restores moisture instantly—revealing visibly plumper, fresher, more radiant skin mid-flight.

problem.headline: Cabin Air Is Quietly Dehydrating Your Skin
problem.description: Aircraft cabins can drop to humidity levels as low as 10%—far below what healthy skin requires. Within hours, moisture is stripped from your complexion, leaving skin dry, tight, puffy, and visibly fatigued before arrival.

problemPoints.title: Severe Moisture Loss
problemPoints.description: Low cabin humidity rapidly depletes hydration, weakening your skin barrier and dulling your natural glow.

problemPoints.title: Puffiness and Fatigue
problemPoints.description: Air pressure changes and dehydration contribute to swelling, tired eyes, and a visibly stressed complexion.

benefits.headline: Engineered for Altitude
benefits.subheadline: Every ingredient chosen to combat the unique stress of air travel.

steps.title: Prep
steps.desc: Begin with freshly cleansed skin before boarding or shortly after takeoff.

steps.title: Apply
steps.desc: Smooth a small amount of AirHydra over face and neck.

steps.title: Refresh
steps.desc: Reapply every 2–3 hours to maintain hydration throughout your journey.

lifestyle.headline: Skincare That Travels First-Class
lifestyle.description: IAirHydra is more than skincare—it is your in-flight beauty ritual. Designed for discerning travelers who refuse to compromise on how they arrive.
lifestyle.ctaPrefill: Hi AirHydra, I'd like to order — I deserve first-class skin care.

testimonialsList.name: Jessica W.
testimonialsList.text: My skin no longer feels dry or tired after flights. AirHydra has become a permanent part of my carry-on.

testimonialsList.name: Alex T.
testimonialsList.text: The first skincare product I have used specifically for flying that actually delivers.

testimonialsList.name: Priya M.
testimonialsList.text: My skin looked fresher after landing than before takeoff. Truly impressive.

storesList.pickupInstructions: Ask for AirHydra at the beauty counter near the departure lounge.

storesList.name: LHR - Terminal 5
storesList.pickupInstructions: Available at the travel essentials store after security.

faqList.question: Is AirHydra suitable for all skin types?
faqList.answer: Yes. Our formula is dermatologist-tested and suitable for dry, oily, combination, and sensitive skin.

faqList.question: How often should I apply it during a flight?
faqList.answer: We recommend every 2–3 hours, depending on flight duration and skin needs.

faqList.question: Can I use it when I am not flying?
faqList.answer: Absolutely. AirHydra performs beautifully in any dry environment, including offices, hotels, and air-conditioned spaces.

finalCta.headline: Elevate Your Travel Experience
finalCta.description: Join discerning travelers who have made AirHydra their in-flight essential for radiant arrivals.
finalCta.ctaPrefill: Hi AirHydra, I'm ready to elevate my travel with the premium In-Flight Hydrating Gel.
